title: Manufacturing Engineer - Astral Pipes - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Astral Pipes - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Astral Pipes has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Astral Pipes:
Astral Pipes is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Astral Pipes!
